title: How to determine how long an entry stays at a particular stage before it changes
excerpt:
How would you  work out how long an item on a board has sat at a particular stage ? As in, if you were trying to see how long each stage typically lasts for each line item is there a formula that could give you this? 
Ap…

posts.author: Masamoto15 (Masamoto Takeshi)
posts.cookedHtml:
How would you work out how long an item on a board has sat at a particular stage ? As in, if you were trying to see how long each stage typically lasts for each line item is there a formula that could give you this?

Appreciate any help in this as it would help with project oversight.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Masamoto15

Welcome to the Community!

I would recommend using The Time Tracking Column for this instead!
You can create an automation that will automatically start the time tracking when a status changes to something, and stop it when the status changes to another status.

You can find this automation below:

image680×652 30.8 KB

Could this work for you?

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Masamoto15 (Masamoto Takeshi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dani,

Thank you very much for your suggestion. I have tried implementing this into my board to see how it works and it appears to do what I asked for. Will need to see over a lengthier period if there are any limitations but quite happy currently.

Thanks once again and enjoy the rest of your day.
